SPARQL query over wikidata:
```sparql
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
SELECT ?birthYear WHERE {
  ?player wdt:P1344 wd:Q2070302 .
  ?player wdt:P569 ?birthDate .
  BIND(YEAR(?birthDate) AS ?birthYear)
  OPTIONAL {
    ?player wdt:P734 ?lastName
  }
}
ORDER BY ASC(?birthYear) ASC(?lastName)
LIMIT 6
```
